name: NewDocument
description: Creates a new document based on the specified template.

parameters.name: TemplateName
parameters.description: Fully qualified path and name of the template to use for creating the new document

parameters.name: PaperSize
parameters.description: Size of paper as defined in swDwgPaperSizes_e

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Width of paper; used only when PaperSize is swDwgPapersUserDefined

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Height of paper; used only when PaperSize is swDwgPapersUserDefined

return_value: Newly created document or NULL if the operation fails

name: GetUserPreferenceStringValue
description: Gets system default user preference values.

parameters.name: UserPreference
parameters.description: User preference as defined in swUserPreferenceStringValue_e

return_value: Value of UserPreference

name: Extension
description: Gets the IModelDocExtension object, which also allows access to the model document.

name: SketchManager
description: Gets the sketch manager, which allows access to sketch-creation routines.

name: FeatureManager
description: Gets the IFeatureManager object, which allows access to the FeatureManager design tree.

name: SelectByID2
description: Selects the specified entity.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Name of object to select or an empty string

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Type of object (uppercase) as defined in swSelectType_e or an empty string

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: X selection location or 0

parameters.name: Y
parameters.description: Y selection location or 0

parameters.name: Z
parameters.description: Z selection location or 0

parameters.name: Append
parameters.description:
If...	An, if entity is...	Then...
True	Not already selected	Entity is appended to the current selection list
	Already selected	Entity is removed from the current selection list
False	Not already selected	Current selection is cleared and then the entity is put on the list
	Already selected	Current selection list remains the same

parameters.name: Mark
parameters.description: Value that you want to use as a mark; this value is used by other functions that require ordered selection (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Callout
parameters.description: Pointer to the associated callout

parameters.name: SelectOption
parameters.description: Selection option as defined in swSelectOption_e (see Remarks)

return_value: True if item was successfully selected, false if not

name: InsertSketch
description: Draws or inserts a new two-dimensional sketch on the first face or plane selected in the active document to begin 2D geometry creation.

parameters.name: UpdateEditRebuild
parameters.description: True to rebuild the part with any changes made to the sketch and exit sketch mode, false to not

name: FeatureExtrusion3
description: Creates an extruded feature.

parameters.name: Sd
parameters.description: True for single ended, false for double ended

parameters.name: Flip
parameters.description: True to flip the side to cut

parameters.name: Dir
parameters.description: True to flip the direction of extrusion

parameters.name: T1
parameters.description: Termination type for first end of the extrusion as defined in swEndConditions_e

parameters.name: T2
parameters.description: Termination type for second end of the extrusion as defined in swEndConditions_e

parameters.name: D1
parameters.description: Depth of extrusion for first end in meters; offset, if T1 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: D2
parameters.description: Depth of extrusion for second end in meters; offset, if T2 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: Dchk1
parameters.description: True to allow drafting in the first direction, false to not

parameters.name: Dchk2
parameters.description: True to allow drafting in the second direction, false to not

parameters.name: Ddir1
parameters.description: True for first draft angle to be inward, false to be outward; valid only if Dchk1 is true

parameters.name: Ddir2
parameters.description: True for second draft angle to be inward, false to be outward; valid only if Dchk2 is true

parameters.name: Dang1
parameters.description: Draft angle for first end; valid only if Dchk1 is true

parameters.name: Dang2
parameters.description: Draft angle for second end; valid only if Dchk2 is true

parameters.name: OffsetReverse1
parameters.description: True to offset the first end from another face or plane in a direction away from the sketch, false to offset in a direction toward the sketch; valid only if T1 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: OffsetReverse2
parameters.description: True to offset the second end from another face or plane in a direction away from the sketch, false to offset in a direction toward the sketch; valid only if T2 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: TranslateSurface1
parameters.description: True if the first end of the extrusion is a translation of the reference surface, false if it has a true offset; valid only if T1 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: TranslateSurface2
parameters.description: True if the second end of the extrusion is a translation of the reference surface, false if it has a true offset; valid only if T2 is set to swEndConditions_e.swEndCondOffsetFromSurface

parameters.name: Merge
parameters.description: True to merge the results in a multibody part, false to not

parameters.name: UseFeatScope
parameters.description: True if the feature only affects selected bodies, false if the feature affects all bodies (see Remarks)

parameters.name: UseAutoSelect
parameters.description: True to automatically select all bodies and have the feature affect those bodies, false to select the bodies that the feature affects (see Remarks)

parameters.name: T0
parameters.description: Start condition as defined in swStartConditions_e

parameters.name: StartOffset
parameters.description: Distance from the sketch plane to start the extrude; valid only if T0 is set to swStartConditions_e.swStartOffset

parameters.name: FlipStartOffset
parameters.description: True to flip the direction of the start offset, false to not; valid only if T0 is set to swStartConditions_e.swStartOffset

return_value: IFeature

name: GetBodies2
description: Gets the bodies in this part.

parameters.name: BodyType
parameters.description: Type of body as defined in swBodyType_e

parameters.name: BVisibleOnly
parameters.description: True gets only the visible bodies, false gets all of the bodies in the part

return_value: Array of bodies

name: InsertMoveCopyBody2
description: Translate the sketch using the defined translation vector (X, Y, Z)

parameters.name: TransX
parameters.description: Value for delta X; applies to translation and valid only if Rot* parameters are null or Nothing (see Remarks)

parameters.name: TransY
parameters.description: Value for delta Y; applies to translation and valid only if Rot* parameters are null or Nothing (see Remarks)

parameters.name: TransZ
parameters.description: Value for delta Z; applies to translation and valid only if Rot* parameters are null or Nothing (see Remarks)

parameters.name: TransDist
parameters.description: Distance ; applies to translation and valid only if Rot* parameters are null or Nothing (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotPointX
parameters.description: Value for X rotation origin; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotPointY
parameters.description: Value for Y rotation origin; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotPointZ
parameters.description: Value for Z rotation origin; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotAngleX
parameters.description: Value for X rotation angle; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotAngleY
parameters.description: Value for Y rotation angle; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: RotAngleZ
parameters.description: Value for Z rotation angle; applies to rotation (see Remarks)

parameters.name: BCopy
parameters.description: True if a copy operation, false if a move operation

parameters.name: NumCopies
parameters.description: Number of copies to create

return_value: Pointer to the IFeature object

name: EditRebuild3
description: Rebuilds only those features that need to be rebuilt in the active configuration in the model.
return_value: True if only those features that need to be rebuilt are rebuilt in the active configuration in the model, false if not

name: SaveAs3
description: Exports or saves the active model (document) to a specified file path as a specific file format, such as an STL, STEP, or PDF file.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Full pathname of the document to save; the file extension indicates any conversion that should be performed (for example, Part1.igs to save in IGES format) (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: Format in which to save this document as defined in swSaveAsVersion_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: Option indicating how to save the document as defined in swSaveAsOptions_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ExportData
parameters.description: IExportPdfData object for exporting drawing sheets to PDF (see Remarks)

parameters.name: AdvancedSaveAsOptions
parameters.description: IAdvancedSaveAsOptions (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Errors that caused the save to fail as defined in swFileSaveError_e (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Warnings
parameters.description: Warnings or extra information generated during the save operation as defined in swFileSaveWarning_e (see Remarks)

return_value: True if the save is successful, false if not

name: CreateCoordinateSystem
description: Creates a coordinate system feature using the specified entities.

parameters.name: OriginPointEntity
parameters.description: Entity (vertex, point, midpoint, or the default point of origin on a part or assembly) for the coordinate system origin

parameters.name: XAxisEntities
parameters.description: Array of entities (vertex, point, or midpoint; linear edge or sketch line; non-linear edge or sketch entity; or planar face) for the x axis

parameters.name: YAxisEntities
parameters.description: Array of entities (vertex, point, or midpoint; linear edge or sketch line; non-linear edge or sketch entity; or planar face) for the y axis

parameters.name: ZAxisEntities
parameters.description: Array of entities (vertex, point, or midpoint; linear edge or sketch line; non-linear edge or sketch entity; or planar face) for the z axis

return_value: Feature

name: SketchModifyRotate
description: Rotates the coordinate system of the active or selected sketch.

parameters.name: CenterX
parameters.description: X point to rotate about

parameters.name: CenterY
parameters.description: Y point to rotate about

parameters.name: Angle
parameters.description: Angle of rotation

name: SketchModifyTranslate
description: Translates the coordinate system of the active or selected sketch.

parameters.name: StartX
parameters.description: X sketch value defining the from-position

parameters.name: StartY
parameters.description: Y sketch value defining the from-position

parameters.name: EndX
parameters.description: X sketch value defining the to-position

parameters.name: EndY
parameters.description: Y sketch value defining the to-position

return_value: The sketch is translated from the XY start point position to the XY end point position.

name: InsertMagneticLine
description: Inserts a magnetic line at the specified start and end points on this drawing sheet.

parameters.name: StartPoint
parameters.description: IMathPoint

parameters.name: EndPoint
parameters.description: IMathPoint

return_value: IMagneticLine

name: CreateCenterLine
description: Creates a center line between the specified points.

parameters.name: X1
parameters.description: X coordinate of first end point, in meters

parameters.name: Y1
parameters.description: Y coordinate of first end point, in meters

parameters.name: Z1
parameters.description: Z coordinate of first end point, in meters

parameters.name: X2
parameters.description: X coordinate of second end point, in meters

parameters.name: Y2
parameters.description: Y coordinate of second end point, in meters

parameters.name: Z2
parameters.description: Z coordinate of second end point, in meters

return_value: Sketch segment for the center line

name: SketchModifyScale
description: Scales the active or selected sketch.

parameters.name: ScaleFactor
parameters.description: Amount by which to scale sketch

return_value: True if successful, false if not

name: AccuracyLevel
description: Gets or sets the accuracy level used to calculate mass properties.
property_value: Accuracy level as defined in swMassPropertyAccuracyLevel_e

name: UseSystemUnits
description: Gets or sets whether to use system units or document units when calculating mass properties.
property_value: True to use system units, false to use document units

name: GetOverrideOptions
description: Gets the mass property override options for the selected bodies/components.
return_value: IMassPropertyOverrideOptions

name: SetOverrideOptions
description: Sets the mass property override options for the selected bodies/components.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: IMassPropertyOverrideOptions

parameters.name: Config_option
parameters.description: Configuration option as defined in swInConfigurationOpts_e

parameters.name: Config_names
parameters.description: Array of configuration names; valid only if Config_option = swInConfigurationOpts_e.swSpecifyConfiguration

return_value: True if the mass property override options are set successfully, false if not

name: OverrideMass
description: Gets or sets whether to override the calculated mass value for the model currently being edited.
property_value: True to override the calculated mass value, false to not

name: CreateMassProperty2
description: Creates a mass properties object.
return_value: IMassProperty2

name: SetMaterialPropertyName2
description: Sets the name of the material property for the specified configuration.

parameters.name: ConfigName
parameters.description: Name of configuration

parameters.name: Database
parameters.description: Name of the material database (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Name of material (see Remarks)

name: GetImportFileData
description: Gets the IGES or DXF/DWG import data for the specified file.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Path and name of the IGES or DXF/DWG file

return_value: IGES import data or DXF/DWG import data

name: LoadFile4
description: Loads a third-party native CAD file into a new SOLIDWORKS document using 3D Interconnect.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: Full path and file name of the third-party native CAD part or assembly document to import (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ArgString
parameters.description: Space-separated string that allows optional arguments to be specified when opening a third-party native CAD file; empty string if 3D Interconnect is enabled (see Remarks)

parameters.name: ImportData
parameters.description: IImportIgesData, IImportDxfDwgData, or IImportStepData object; null or Nothing if 3D Interconnect is not enabled (see Remarks)

parameters.name: Errors
parameters.description: Errors as defined in swFileLoadError_e

return_value: Model document

name: Volume
description: Gets the volume of selected components/bodies.

name: Volume
description: Gets the volume of selected components/bodies.

name: PrincipalMomentsOfInertia
description: Gets the principal moments of inertia.

name: Density
description: Gets the density of selected components/bodies.

name: GetMomentOfInertia
description: Gets the moment of inertia at the specified coordinate system for the selected bodies/components.

parameters.name: WhereTaken
parameters.description: Coordinate system as defined in swMassPropertyMoment_e

return_value: Array containing the moment of inertia calculations (see Remarks)

name: Mass
description: Gets the mass of selected components/bodies.

name: SurfaceArea
description: Gets the surface area of selected components/bodies.

name: SetCoordinateSystem
description: Sets the coordinate system to use when calculating mass properties for this model.

parameters.name: Coords
parameters.description: Math transform

return_value: True if the coordinate system is set, false if not
